description: Joe Van Loon introduces Radar, an open-source static analysis tool for Solana programs, emphasizing its ease of use for developers and auditors. He discusses its features, including customizable detectors and integration with GitHub workflows.
topic_summary: In this presentation, Joe Van Loon explains Radar, a static analysis tool designed for Solana programs, highlighting its unique features and benefits for enhancing project security [t=10:48].
